status.constitutionalAuthorityStatementText:
[Congressional Record Volume 172, Number 115 (Wednesday, July 15, 2026)]
[House]
From the Congressional Record Online through the Government Publishing Office [www.gpo.gov]
By Mr. PERRY:
H.R. 9713.
Congress has the power to enact this legislation pursuant
to the following:
Article 1 Section 8 of the United States Constitution
[Page H4545]

latestAction.text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.

status.title: To remove the United States from the International Monetary Fund, the World Bank Group, or the Asian Development Bank if such an institution assists in providing debt relief to the People's Republic of China, and for other purposes.
